sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Williams Companies (WMB) director receives 4,873-share stock award, now holds 75,586 shares
feed.summary: Williams Companies (WMB) director Peter A. Ragauss was granted 4,873 shares of common stock on April 28, 2026, as part of a compensation award, valued at $73.04 per share. Following this transaction, Ragauss now directly holds 75,586 shares of Williams Companies stock. The total includes 2,738 stock units for the 2026 annual grant and 2,135 dividend equivalents, which are exempt from Section 16 reporting.

feed.title: Insider sales reported at NEM (NYSE: NEM) — 3,000-share notices
feed.summary: Newmont (NEM) has reported insider sale notices via Form 144, including a 3,000-share notice through Fidelity Brokerage Services and two past dispositions by Peter I. Toth for 3,000 shares each in March and April 2026. The filing also detailed prior restricted stock vesting events in 2024 and 2025 related to compensation. The sales are noted to have a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) rose 4.2% after the insurance brokerage firm reported first-quarter 2026 results. The company met revenue expectations and slightly surpassed profit forecasts, driven by a 27.9% year-over-year increase in revenue to $4.76 billion and adjusted EPS of $4.47. Despite a year-to-date decline, the positive reaction was also bolstered by an "Outperform" rating from Mizuho and increased institutional backing.

feed.title: Matador Resources and SM Energy Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Matador Resources (NYSE:MTDR) and SM Energy (NYSE:SM) fell after Iran submitted a new peace proposal, causing a drop in global oil prices. Brent crude decreased by 2%, and West Texas Intermediate (WTI) saw a 3.7% decline, impacting oil and gas companies due to potential lower revenues. SM Energy, despite its current dip, has been highly volatile but is up significant year-to-date and has shown strong returns over five years.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Freeport-McMoRan to $66 From $67
feed.summary: Citigroup has adjusted its price target for Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) to $66, down from the previous $67. This change reflects an updated outlook by the financial institution on the specialty mining and metals company. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments for Freeport-McMoRan.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Gartner, Inc. (IT) Shareholders Who Lost
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is reminding investors who purchased Gartner, Inc. (IT) common stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, of an upcoming May 18, 2026, deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made misleading statements regarding its contract value growth rate, which significantly declined, causing substantial stock price drops and investor losses. Investors who suffered losses are urged to contact the firm to inquire about their rights.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges LKQ Corporation Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ: LKQ) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 27, 2023, and July 23, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that LKQ made false and misleading statements regarding its acquisition and integration of FinishMaster, claiming it was not the "minimal integration risk" or "compelling strategic fit" represented. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to join the case, with a lead plaintiff deadline of June 22, 2026.

feed.title: BofA raises TD Synnex stock price target to $270 on Hyve growth
feed.summary: BofA Securities has raised its price target for TD Synnex (NYSE: SNX) to $270 from $200, maintaining a Buy rating. The increase is driven by the strong growth and higher margins of Hyve, which BofA sees as an underappreciated asset expanding its addressable market by working with the top five U.S. hyperscalers. The firm projects Hyve's revenue to grow at a 20% three-year compound annual growth rate, leading to earnings estimates above consensus and supporting the stock's attractive valuation as an undervalued equity.

feed.title: SMTC (NASDAQ: SMTC) Form 144 shows Hong Hou sold 2,000 shares on 04/10/2026
feed.summary: A recently filed Form 144 for SMTC (NASDAQ: SMTC) indicates that Hong Hou sold 2,000 shares on April 10, 2026, generating proceeds of $180,220. The filing also details restricted stock vesting events, including 1,534 shares vesting on June 9, 2024, and 466 shares vesting on June 11, 2025. Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC is identified as a broker-custodian in connection with these transactions.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Pops 14.5% After Q1 Beat: Still a Buy or Too Late Now?
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) saw its shares climb 14.5% after a strong first-quarter 2026 report, surpassing earnings and revenue expectations due to growth in commercial fee-based membership and Optum Rx strength. Despite improved profitability and a raised EPS guidance for 2026, regulatory and legal risks, along with ongoing membership pressures and current valuation levels, present headwinds. The stock, currently carrying a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), prompts investors to seek clearer visibility on membership trends and regulatory outcomes before further investment.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) Price Target Raised to $995.00
feed.summary: Guggenheim raised its price target for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) to $995.00 from $975.00, maintaining a "buy" rating with a potential upside of 41.25%. This comes after Regeneron reported stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings and revenue, along with announcing a $3 billion share repurchase program and a quarterly dividend. Despite the positive financial results, the stock experienced a slight dip, attributed to mixed analyst reactions regarding a U.S. Eylea HD shortfall and insider selling, although institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser reported solid Q1 2026 results with GAAP net earnings of $156 million and adjusted EBITDA of $308 million, a 120% sequential increase. The company saw improvements across all business segments, benefiting from higher lumber and OSB pricing, and completed significant portfolio optimization actions. Despite inflationary pressures and housing market choppiness, Weyerhaeuser remains focused on strategic growth initiatives, including new product development and distribution network expansion, while reiterating full-year guidance for Strategic Land Solutions and maintaining a disciplined approach to capital allocation.

feed.title: Kroger Health and Hy-Vee announce line up for 2026 Nourishing Change Conference
feed.summary: Kroger Health and Hy-Vee have announced the final agenda and speaker line-up for the 2026 Nourishing Change Conference, scheduled for June 2–4, 2026, in Des Moines, Iowa. The conference will focus on the intersection of food, retail, technology, and equity in shaping the future of health. Featured speakers include Amy Gleason from US DOGE, Jim Kirby from Kroger Health, and Adam Proctor from Nebraska Total Care, addressing topics like digital health, health equity, and value-based care.

feed.title: Chatterton & Associates Inc.'s Schwab US Aggregate Bond ETF(SCHZ) Holding History
feed.summary: Chatterton & Associates Inc. holds 232,291 shares of Schwab US Aggregate Bond ETF (SCHZ), valued at $5.41 million as of March 31, 2026, representing 3.79% of their stock portfolio. This position was established with a single purchase in Q4 2025 at an average price of $23.46 per share. Based on the current SCHZ price of $23.14, the firm has an estimated unrealized loss of $74,119.80, or -1.36%.

feed.title: The Freelux Project Announces “The Butch Queen’s Brunch & Conversations Tour” Powered by Gilead Sciences
feed.summary: The Freelux Project is launching "The Butch Queen’s Brunch & Conversations Tour," powered by Gilead Sciences, to create affirming spaces for Black queer and bisexual men. The multi-city tour expands on a successful pilot, focusing on health, wellness, and community through dialogues and HIV testing initiatives. This expansion aims to reduce barriers to care, normalize testing, and address the ongoing need for accessible, community-led health spaces.

feed.title: New England transmission owners ask FERC for increased ROE
feed.summary: New England transmission owners, including Eversource and Avangrid, have asked the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) to raise their base return on equity (ROE) to 11.39% from the recently set 9.57%. They argue that a higher ROE is necessary to attract capital for sustained transmission investment, citing updated financial metrics and current risk conditions, despite recent litigation that led FERC to cut the ROE and order $1.5 billion in refunds to ratepayers. The proposal faces opposition from public advocates who claim it uses flawed analysis.

feed.title: OneSpan Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: OneSpan Inc. reported its first-quarter 2026 financial results, with total revenue increasing 4% year-over-year to $65.9 million and subscription revenue growing 8% to $52.7 million. The company also announced the acquisition of Build38 to strengthen its cybersecurity offerings and updated its full-year 2026 financial guidance, increasing its ARR expectations. OneSpan's CEO highlighted solid profitability and subscription revenue growth and emphasized continued focus on efficient growth, strong profitability, cash generation, and returning capital to shareholders.

feed.title: Altria to Host Webcast of 2026 Annual Meeting May 14
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. will host its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders via live audio webcast on May 14 at 9 a.m. ET. Shareholders of record as of March 25 can vote and submit questions during the virtual meeting, while others can attend as guests. An archived webcast and supporting resources will be available on the company's investor website.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Lowers Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) Price Target to $235.00
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reduced its price target for Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) to $235.00 from $246.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating, despite AJG reporting stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings with a 29% revenue increase. The adjustment reflects mixed analyst views, insider sales, and valuation concerns, even as the company guides for 6% organic growth in FY2026 and raises its synergy target for AssuredPartners. Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts, with an average target price of $271.82.

feed.title: Michael Moehn sells 6,500 AEE shares for $673,400 (NYSE: AEE)
feed.summary: Michael Moehn has sold 6,500 shares of Ameren Corp (AEE) for $673,400, as detailed in a recent Form 144 SEC filing. The filing, dated February 2, 2026, also notes past restricted stock vesting of 1,065 shares on September 18, 2023, and 5,435 shares on March 1, 2024. This transaction is categorized as a routine insider sale with a neutral impact.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Increases Schneider National (NYSE:SNDR) Price Target to $33.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Schneider National (NYSE:SNDR) to $33.00, up from $25.00, while maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This adjustment implies a potential upside of approximately 3.3% from the stock's previous close. Despite beating Q1 EPS estimates, the company missed revenue expectations and provided full-year guidance that may impact its near-term valuation, though a $150 million share buyback and a $.10 quarterly dividend were also announced.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) Earns "Overweight" Rating from Cantor Fitzgerald
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has reissued an "Overweight" rating for Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR), setting a $211 price target, which suggests a 5.1% upside. This aligns with a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, with some firms even raising targets to the $215-$235 range. The company reported Q1 EPS of $0.46 and revenue of $1.64 billion, meeting estimates, and provided FY2026 EPS guidance of $7.95-$8.05.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on First Solar to $310 From $300
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has increased its price target for First Solar (FSLR) to $310 from $300, as reported by MT Newswires on May 1, 2026, at 11:34 am EDT. The article also mentions recent news items including First Solar's Q1 2026 earnings call, a rise in quarterly sales, and several other analyst adjustments to the company's price target.

feed.title: Thomas Chorman to sell via Fidelity (NYSE: SXI) — Form 144 notice
feed.summary: Thomas Chorman has filed a Form 144 notice indicating a proposed sale of 50 Common shares of Standex International Corp. (NYSE: SXI) through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, dated May 1, 2026. This filing also details previous dispositions of SXI shares within the last three months, including 513 shares sold on February 27, 2026, and smaller 50-share transactions on other dates. The shares to be sold originated from restricted stock vesting related to compensation.

feed.title: Bank of America Denied Quick Appeal Over 401(k) Forfeiture Use
feed.summary: Bank of America Corp. has been denied an immediate appeal regarding a decision that requires it to defend its handling of 401(k) contributions forfeited by employees. A judge ruled that the case depends on the specific terms of the bank's 401(k) plan document, not a narrow legal issue, meaning it will proceed to discovery. The legal proceedings will investigate how expenses and forfeitures were applied and how fiduciaries exercised their discretion within the plan.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Increases Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) Price Target to $167.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) to $167.00 from $137.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This decision follows Roku's strong Q1 earnings beat, with EPS of $0.57 against a $0.34 consensus and revenues of $1.25 billion, surpassing expectations. The company also saw significant ad revenue growth and increased its annual platform revenue guidance, leading to several other brokerage firms also lifting their price targets and ratings.

feed.title: Stifel Nicolaus Remains a Buy on Stantec (STN)
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus analyst Ian Gillies maintained a Buy rating on Stantec (STN) with a price target of C$140.00. Another firm, TD Cowen, also reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. Insider sentiment for Stantec is positive, with an increase in insider buying activity over the past quarter.

feed.title: EOG Resources to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What Investors Should Know
feed.summary: EOG Resources (EOG) is scheduled to report its first-quarter 2026 earnings on May 5th, with analysts expecting an increase in EPS and revenues. The company's strong production in premier oil shale plays and the positive impact of higher commodity prices, especially from the United States-Iran conflict, are factors anticipated to drive strong quarterly performance. EOG currently has a Zacks Rank #2 and an Earnings ESP of +7.62%, indicating a likely earnings beat.

feed.title: AIG Q1 2026 slides: EPS surges 80% on strong underwriting gains
feed.summary: American International Group Inc. (AIG) reported an "outstanding" Q1 2026, with adjusted EPS surging 80% year-over-year to $2.11, significantly beating analyst estimates. The strong performance was driven by remarkable underwriting gains in its General Insurance segment, with net premiums written increasing by 24% and the combined ratio improving by 850 basis points to 87.3%. AIG also announced a strategic investment in Convex Group Limited and continued capital returns to shareholders, including a doubled dividend and share repurchases.

feed.title: Applovin Corp Stock (APP) Moved Up by 3.22% on May 1: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Applovin Corp (APP) stock experienced a 3.22% increase on May 1st, driven by anticipation for its upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report and positive analyst revisions to revenue estimates. The company's AI-driven advertising engine is a key factor cited by analysts for its growth potential, with strong "Buy" ratings and substantial price targets. Technical indicators show a buy signal from MACD, though RSI and Williams %R suggest neutral to oversold conditions amidst intraday volatility.

feed.title: Shopify Inc Stock (SHOP) Moved Up by 4.04% on May 1: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Shopify Inc (SHOP) stock surged by 4.04% on May 1st, driven by strong investor anticipation ahead of its Q1 2026 financial results, which are expected to show robust profit and revenue growth. The company's underlying business fundamentals, including GMV growth, Shopify Payments expansion, international presence, and advancements in AI integration and commerce standards, are contributing to investor confidence despite concerns about valuation and growth moderation. Analysts maintain a positive outlook, expecting an implied upside for the stock.

feed.title: Board of Directors of The Coca‑Cola Company Elects Two New Officers and Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: The Board of Directors of The Coca‑Cola Company has elected Sedef Salingan Sahin and Tapaswee Chandele as executive vice presidents, effective March 31 and May 1, respectively. The company also declared a regular quarterly dividend of 53 cents per common share, payable on July 1 to shareowners of record as of June 15. Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO) is a global beverage company with a diverse portfolio of brands.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil shares slip after net income falls sharply despite earnings beat
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil's shares declined after its first-quarter 2026 GAAP net income dropped significantly year-over-year to $4.18 billion, despite beating adjusted earnings and revenue forecasts. Geopolitical conflicts in the Middle East and associated timing effects contributed to the net income reduction. The company highlighted strong operational performance in its upstream portfolio, including record production in Guyana, and returned $9.2 billion to shareholders.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Constellation Energy Price Target to $386 From $400
feed.summary: JPMorgan has lowered its price target for Constellation Energy (CEG) to $386 from $400. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for the company, indicating potential changes in market sentiment or financial outlook for the energy producer. Constellation Energy specializes in clean, zero-carbon energy production, providing nuclear, hydroelectric, wind, and solar power solutions.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Lennox International Price Target to $522 From $493
feed.summary: JPMorgan has adjusted its price target for Lennox International (LII) shares to $522, down from the previous $493. This change in price target was published from MT Newswires on May 1, 2026. The company, a provider of climate control solutions, had recently reported its Q1 2026 earnings with adjusted earnings falling but net sales rising.

feed.title: SPX Technologies Drops 5.1% Amid Sector-Wide Selling
feed.summary: Shares of SPX Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:SPXC) dropped 5.1% to $207.70 on May 1, 2026, as part of a broad sector downturn affecting building products and equipment companies. This decline was mirrored by peers, with KAI down 3.8% and SXI down 9.2%, indicating broader market concerns rather than company-specific issues. Despite the selloff, which saw increased trading volume, analyst sentiment has remained largely supportive in the near term.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Jumps 8.7% to $326.24
authors: AlphaStreet Newsdesk powered by AlphaStreet Intelligence
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) surged 8.7% to $326.24, driven by strong earnings and a strategic restructuring plan that includes job cuts. The exchange operator, a leader in S&P 500 options trading, saw significant trading activity and now boasts a market capitalization of $34.2 billion. Investors are encouraged to monitor the execution of the restructuring plan and potential M&A developments.

feed.title: Surprising Cryptocurrency Ban News from Brazil, Which Approved the World’s First Solana ETF!
feed.summary: Brazil's Central Bank (BCB) has banned the use of cryptocurrencies for international payments on its official cross-border payment network, despite previously approving the world's first Solana ETF. While not a general ban, this measure aims to prevent stablecoins from entering the payment system to improve currency regulation and combat financial crimes. The BCB highlighted risks like tax evasion and money laundering associated with stablecoins and indicated potential future restrictions to preserve monetary sovereignty.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) reported strong Q1 2026 results, with net sales up 0.2% and organic sales growing 5%, driven primarily by volume and distribution gains. The company exceeded its EPS forecast and expanded its adjusted gross margin despite facing incremental inflation pressures from the Middle East conflict. Management reiterated its full-year 2026 outlook, confident in its productivity initiatives and strategic portfolio actions to offset rising costs without increasing consumer prices.

feed.title: Summit Therapeutics Stock Dips After Q1 Financial Report
feed.summary: Summit Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SMMT) shares significantly declined after its first-quarter financial report, despite a better-than-expected Non-GAAP EPS loss. The dip is attributed to increased spending, widening losses, and a lack of immediate clinical catalysts, with non-GAAP net loss nearly tripling and operating expenses more than doubling year-over-year. Cash and short-term investments also decreased due to accelerated cash usage.

feed.title: Kenvue seeks dismissal of class action alleging baby oil misrepresents ingredients
feed.summary: Kenvue is seeking the dismissal of a class action lawsuit claiming its Johnson's brand baby oil misleads consumers about the amount of shea and cocoa butter it contains. Plaintiff Michael Douma alleges the product labeling misleadingly suggests the baby oil is primarily made with these butters, while Kenvue argues the label accurately describes it as an "oil" enriched with the ingredients, and that reasonable consumers read ingredient lists. The company further contends that Douma fails to allege a cognizable injury or plausible deception.

feed.title: IDEAYA Biosciences to Initiate New Drug Application Submission from the Darovasertib OptimUM-02 Trial under the Oncology Center of Excellence Real-time Oncology Review (RTOR) Program
feed.summary: IDEAYA Biosciences announced that the FDA has agreed to review its New Drug Application (NDA) for darovasertib in combination with crizotinib for patients with first-line HLA*A2-negative metastatic uveal melanoma (mUM) under the Real-Time Oncology Review (RTOR) program. The decision follows positive topline data from the Phase 2/3 OptimUM-02 trial, which met its primary endpoint by significantly improving progression-free survival. The company plans to initiate the RTOR submission process in May, with the full NDA filing expected in the second half of 2026, aiming to expedite the availability of this potential new treatment.

feed.title: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. (NASDAQ:SUNS) Short Interest Down 20.6% in April
feed.summary: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. (NASDAQ:SUNS) experienced a significant 20.6% drop in short interest in April, totaling 615,771 shares, which represents about 6.1% of the stock. Despite this reduction in bearish sentiment, analysts maintain a "Sell" rating with a $8.75 price target after the company missed quarterly EPS estimates. The company offers an attractive quarterly dividend of $0.30, resulting in a 15.9% yield.

feed.title: Why Stereotaxis (STXS) Could Be One of the Best Robotics Stocks to Buy Under $30
feed.summary: Stereotaxis, Inc. (NYSE: STXS) is highlighted as a top robotics stock under $30, following the successful U.S. debut of its MAGiC catheter for complex cardiac cases and its recent acquisition of Robocath. This acquisition combines magnetic navigation with mechanical automation, expanding Stereotaxis's market presence in Europe and promising future growth. The article presents a strong case for STXS's potential, though it also suggests other AI stocks might offer quicker, higher returns.

feed.title: Spire Inc. (NYSE:SR) Announces $0.83 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Spire Inc. (NYSE:SR) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.825 per share, payable on July 2nd to shareholders of record on June 11th, marking its 22nd consecutive year of dividend increases. The company's dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 65.2% and an expected future payout ratio of 59.6%. Spire recently surpassed EPS estimates and reported a 13.9% year-over-year revenue increase, providing positive guidance for fiscal years 2026 and 2027.

feed.title: Trending Stocks Today | SOBR Safe Soars 102.38%
feed.summary: SOBR Safe (SOBR) saw a significant surge in its stock price, gaining 102.38% to reach $0.21. This substantial increase highlights its position as a top-performing stock among today's trending equities.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Summit Therapeutics(SMMT.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $41
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reaffirmed its Buy rating for Summit Therapeutics (SMMT.US) and maintained its target price at $41. This indicates continued confidence from the investment bank in the company's prospects.

feed.title: Sandisk Stock Falls From Record After Earnings
feed.summary: Sandisk Corp (NASDAQ:SNDK) shares fell 1.7% to $1,079.86 despite reporting strong fiscal third-quarter earnings with beats on both revenue and earnings per share. The stock initially hit an all-time high of $1,153.32 before retracting, though analysts have significantly raised price targets, including Barclays to $1,200. SNDK has seen a substantial 3,245% gain over the last year, and options activity shows high interest, particularly in the weekly 5/1 1,200-strike call.

feed.title: Analysts’ Opinions Are Mixed on These Real Estate Stocks: Broadstone Net Lease (BNL) and Adamas Trust (ADAM)
feed.summary: Analysts are providing mixed opinions on real estate stocks Broadstone Net Lease (BNL) and Adamas Trust (ADAM). While analysts like Michael Lewis from Truist Financial maintain a Hold rating for Broadstone Net Lease, a Moderate Buy consensus with an average price target exists. Conversely, Adamas Trust (ADAM) holds a Moderate Buy consensus, with analyst Jason Weaver reiterating a Buy rating and TipRanks – PerPlexity upgrading it to Buy.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 7.51% stake in Tyson Foods (NYSE: TSN) via Schedule 13G
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a 7.51% beneficial ownership stake in Tyson Foods Inc. (NYSE: TSN) as of March 31, 2026. This ownership includes 21,194,882 shares with sole dispositive power, while sole voting power is held over 2,878,235 shares. The filing indicates these holdings are for Vanguard funds and managed accounts.
